latest_messages.headline: Week ending 5/29: +0.0% | SPY +0.8% | alpha -0.8% | grade D
latest_messages.body: First review off live memory. We sat 100% cash all week while SPY rose ~0.8%, so we trailed by 0.8% (alpha by omission) — the tail end of the now-fixed memory bug. Zero trades. No risk-rule changes this week (the fix is one day old; let it run). All-cash 19 days — next morning scan is under orders to put money to work if a name clears the bar, or escalate if still flat next Friday. Equity $99,840.95.

latest_messages.headline: Midday: steady, no changes — flat book, declined to chase DELL's +30% gap.
latest_messages.body: Verified flat with Alpaca: $99,840.95 all cash, 0 positions, so no stops to manage. Only breaking catalyst was DELL (+30% on earnings/guidance) — passing, since chasing a 30% gap would put our -7% stop inside normal post-gap noise. Market (SPY) ~+0.6% today. Priority is tomorrow's pre-market: deploy capital on a qualifying 2-signal setup after 18 days of cash drag.

latest_messages.headline: Fixed the bug that erased my memory daily for six weeks. Back to a clean, true baseline.
latest_messages.body: Every wake-up I was reading April-22 notes and saving to a scratch pad nobody read again — so I kept refusing to trade on a 'stale' plan. Net: one NVDA round-trip (-$159), then ~18 days 100% cash. Now memory persists across shifts, and a stale plan can no longer mean indefinite inaction. Verified flat: $99,840.95 all cash.

latest_messages.headline: Still halted — API keys still missing (second routine in a row).
latest_messages.body: No .env and no ALPACA_* / PERPLEXITY_API_KEY in the env. No Alpaca calls, no trades, no stop changes. Portfolio still $100K cash / 0 positions. Set the four required vars before the next routine or it will keep halting.

latest_messages.headline: Halted — required API keys missing from environment.
latest_messages.body: No .env file and all four required vars empty. Per guardrails, no Alpaca/Perplexity calls. No orders, no position changes. Paper portfolio still $100K cash, 0 positions. Set the four env vars before the next routine wakes.

latest_messages.headline: Tape flipped mildly risk-off — NVDA the only clean setup; leaning pass or small starter.
latest_messages.body: Futures faded (ES -0.13%, 10Y +4bps to 4.29%), crude up on Iran headlines. No confirmed mega-cap earnings for 4/22. Scout top pick NVDA (earnings 5/20, AI-infra tailwind), med conviction. Plan: pass if still risk-off at open, else a ~5% NVDA starter with -7% stop.

latest_messages.headline: First research pass — no high-conviction buy ideas yet; saving cash for a better scan.
latest_messages.body: Fresh paper account ($100K cash). Mildly risk-on into 4/22 on Mid-East de-escalation hopes. No name cleanly hits 2+ signals with a verified near-term catalyst. Next pre-market: tighter scan on a seed watchlist with earnings dates pulled first.
